programs.name: Idaho Medicaid Aged and Disabled Waiver
programs.what_it_does: Provides home and community-based services to help seniors and disabled individuals avoid institutionalization. Covers personal care, adult day health, respite, and other supports.
programs.who_its_for: Seniors 65+ or disabled adults eligible for nursing home level care but preferring home living.
programs.benefit_value: Varies by need; covers approved services up to Medicaid limits.

programs.name: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE)
programs.what_it_does: Delivers comprehensive medical and social services to frail seniors in community settings. Coordinates all Medicare and Medicaid-covered care through adult day centers.
programs.who_its_for: Seniors 55+ certified for nursing home level care who can live safely in community.
programs.benefit_value: Full capitation coverage; no copays for participants.

programs.name: Medicare Savings Programs (QMB, SLMB, QI)
programs.what_it_does: Pays Medicare Part A/B premiums, deductibles, and copays for low-income beneficiaries. QMB covers full costs, SLMB/QI cover premiums only.
programs.who_its_for: Seniors 65+ with limited income/assets meeting federal thresholds.
programs.benefit_value: QMB: Full Medicare cost coverage; SLMB: $40.20/month premium (2026); QI: Partial.

programs.name: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP)
programs.what_it_does: Provides monthly EBT card benefits for purchasing groceries and food items. Seniors get deductions for medical expenses over $35/month.

programs.name: Idaho Energy Assistance (LIHEAP)
programs.what_it_does: Assists with heating/cooling bills and weather-related energy crises. Offers one-time payments to eligible households.
programs.who_its_for: Low-income households including seniors; priority for elderly/disabled.

programs.name: Weatherization Assistance Program
programs.what_it_does: Improves home energy efficiency through insulation, sealing, and heating upgrades. Reduces utility costs and health risks from poor conditions.
programs.benefit_value: Free services; average savings $300+/year on energy.

programs.name: Senior Health Insurance Benefits Advisors (SHIBA)
programs.what_it_does: Offers free counseling on Medicare, supplements, and low-income aids. Helps with plan selection, appeals, and fraud prevention.
programs.who_its_for: Idaho seniors and pre-retirees with Medicare questions.

programs.name: Home-Delivered Meals (Title III-C-2)
programs.what_it_does: Delivers nutritious meals to homebound seniors to promote health and independence. Funded under Older Americans Act via Area Agencies on Aging.
programs.who_its_for: Seniors 60+ unable to prepare meals; income-based priority.

programs.name: National Family Caregiver Support Program (NFCSP)
programs.what_it_does: Provides respite care, training, and support groups for family caregivers. Helps caregivers manage stress and continue providing care.
programs.benefit_value: Respite up to 240 hours/year; training free.

programs.name: Senior Community Service Employment Program (SCSEP)
programs.what_it_does: Offers part-time paid training jobs in community nonprofits. Builds skills for unsubsidized employment or volunteer roles.

programs.name: Idaho Legal Aid Services
programs.what_it_does: Delivers free civil legal help for issues like housing, benefits, and abuse. Prioritizes low-income seniors and vulnerable adults.

programs.name: Long-Term Care Ombudsman Program
programs.what_it_does: Advocates for residents in nursing homes/assisted living against abuse/neglect. Investigates complaints and promotes quality care.

programs.name: Idaho Senior Property Tax Reduction Program
programs.what_it_does: Provides a reduction in the taxable value of a senior's primary residence, lowering their property tax bill. The program reimburses a portion of property taxes paid by eligible homeowners.
programs.who_its_for: Idaho residents aged 65 or older (or 61+ if disabled or widow(er)) who own and occupy their home as primary residence and meet income limits.
programs.whats_unique: State-funded property tax relief program unique to Idaho, offering direct reduction or reimbursement beyond federal programs.
programs.benefit_value: Up to $1,320 reduction in taxable value per year, depending on income (e.g., full benefit for incomes under ~$36,000 in 2025)

programs.name: Idaho Homeowner's Exemption for Seniors
programs.what_it_does: Exempts a portion of home value from property taxes for eligible seniors. It applies to the home and up to one acre of land.
programs.who_its_for: Idaho residents aged 65+ who own and live in their home, with household income below state threshold.
programs.whats_unique: Idaho-specific exemption layered on top of federal benefits, targeting property tax burden for aging-in-place seniors.
programs.benefit_value: $125,000 exemption on assessed home value, saving hundreds annually based on local mill rates

programs.name: LEARN Idaho Senior Education Programs
programs.what_it_does: Offers free video libraries, in-person tech classes, and online courses on caregiving, digital literacy, health, and elder resources. Includes TechEd for Seniors focusing on device use and scam prevention.
programs.who_its_for: Idaho seniors 60+, caregivers, and professionals statewide.
programs.whats_unique: Statewide nonprofit initiative tailored to Idaho's aging population with region-specific content like Treasure Valley classes, not a standard federal offering.
programs.benefit_value: Completely free access to unlimited self-paced and in-person education resources

programs.name: EICAP Senior Housing Program
programs.what_it_does: Provides affordable housing units for seniors to live independently. Coordinates in-home supportive services to help seniors remain safely at home.
programs.who_its_for: Persons 60+ and/or handicapped/disabled in eastern Idaho (Idaho Falls, St. Anthony) meeting income and tenant criteria.
programs.whats_unique: State-regionally owned and operated senior housing (92 units) by Area Agency on Aging, beyond federal Section 202 housing.
programs.benefit_value: Subsidized rents based on income; specific rates via direct contact
